subcodes.first_line: Thy letter was presented before the Wronged One and the glance of His loving-kindness was directed towards it. Praise be to God, it is adorned with the ornament of divine love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه ات نزد مظلوم حاضر و لحاظ عنایت بان متوجه لله الحمد بطراز محبت الهی مزین
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @love of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
